problem id: 3ad042eb
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(2) XOR SHR(4)

examples:
  11001100 -> 00111100
  11000111 -> 00010000
  10000001 -> 00001100
  00010011 -> 01001101
  10010110 -> 01010001
  01101001 -> 10100010
  01010011 -> 01001001
  01011010 -> 01101101
  11011001 -> 01101001
  01010010 -> 01001101

query: 10010111
predicted answer: 01010101
